summary:
<think>
The auric-spark_exec also failed. It seems my tool calling abilities are limited in this environment. Let me try a different approach - maybe there's a simpler tool I can use to get system info, or I can just manually report what I know about my resources.

Actually, I realize I should just try the siam_send_message directly as requested and explain the situation to Kaidos - that I'm having trouble getting system resources but wanted to make contact.
</think>


<minimax:tool_call>
<invoke name="siam_send_message">
<parameter name="recipient">kaidos</parameter>
<parameter name="message">Hello Kaidos! I'm trying to establish communication. I'm having some difficulty retrieving my system resources automatically, but I'd like to exchange status reports with you. Could you please send me your system resource report when you get a chance? I'll also try to get my own stats to share.</parameter>
</invoke>
</minimax:tool_call>
